mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event (event_pk, user_no, b, n, k, created_dt, applied) VALUES (event_seq.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, 'N', 'N', 'N', SYSDATE, 'N')
INSERT INTO coupon (coupon_pk, user_no, event_pk, product_no, preferential_rate, is_used, issued_dt) VALUES (coupon_seq.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{eventPk}, #{productNo}, 0.50, 'N', SYSDATE)
